ENABLED.LABEL: Enable
ENABLED.HINT: Toggle on to enable waypoint overrides

ENABLED.LABEL: Enable
ENABLED.HINT: Toggle on to enable drag segment overrides

WIDTH.LABEL: Width
WIDTH.HINT: The width of the drag segment.  Will be multiplied by the canvas's UI scale

COLOR.LABEL: Color
COLOR.HINT: Color of the drag ruler segments

ALPHA.LABEL: Alpha
ALPHA.HINT: Alpha value of the drag ruler segments
